sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# Let me check what changed after clicking the purple bar
green_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print("Green objects remaining:", len(green_nodes))
# Check the purple bar might be a timer/progress bar. Maybe I need to keep clicking it to fill it up.
# Let me check the purple bar's size changed
purple_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'p]
print("Purple nodes:", len(purple_nodes)
for n in purple_nodes:
    print("  ", n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
